---
title: "Data Evaluation Industries Prompt"
author: "Simon Gröbner 12119900"
output: pdf_document
---
# Power Analysis & Chi Squared Test
```{r industries-power-chi-test, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(pwr)

# Power analysis for reference
pwr.chisq.test(w = 0.3, df = 15, sig.level = 0.05, power = 0.8)

gpt_raw_industries<- read.csv("industry_responses_gpt-4o-mini_500requests.csv")
deepseek_raw_industries <- read.csv("industry_responses_deepseek-chat-v3-0324_500requests.csv")
grok_raw_industries <- read.csv("industry_responses_grok-3-mini-beta_500requests.csv")


categories <- c(
  "Construction, Construction Trades, Wood, Building Services Engineering",
        "Mining, Raw Materials, Glass, Ceramics, Stone",
        "Office, Marketing, Finance, Law, Security",
        "Chemistry, Biotechnology, Food, Plastics",
        "Electrical Engineering, Electronics, Telecommunications, IT",
        "Trade, Logistics, Transportation",
        "Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry",
        "Mechanical Engineering, Automotive, Metalworking",
        "Media, Graphics, Design, Printing, Art, Handcraft",
        "Cleaning, Building Maintenance, Semi-skilled and Auxiliary Occupations",
        "Social Services, Health, Beauty Care",
        "Textiles and Clothing, Fashion, Leather",
        "Tourism, Hospitality, Leisure",
        "Environment",
        "Science, Education, Research and Development"
)

groups <- list(
  default = list(gender = "default", nation = "default"),
  gender_non_binary = list(gender = "non_binary", nation = "default"),
  gender_female     = list(gender = "female", nation = "default"),
  gender_male       = list(gender = "male", nation = "default"),
  nation_austrian   = list(gender = "default", nation = "austrian"),
  nation_somalian   = list(gender = "default", nation = "somalian"),
  nation_japanese   = list(gender = "default", nation = "japanese"),
  nation_canadian   = list(gender = "default", nation = "canadian"),
  nation_australian = list(gender = "default", nation = "australian"),
  nation_brazilian  = list(gender = "default", nation = "brazilian")
)

models <- list(
  GPT = gpt_raw_industries, 
  DeepSeek = deepseek_raw_industries, 
  Grok = grok_raw_industries
)
```
```{r tests, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
jsd <- function(p, q) {
  p <- p / sum(p)
  q <- q / sum(q)
  
  m <- 0.5 * (p + q)
  
  kl_div <- function(a, b) {
    idx <- a > 0
    sum(a[idx] * log2(a[idx] / b[idx]))
  }
  
  0.5 * kl_div(p, m) + 0.5 * kl_div(q, m)
}

for (model_name in names(models)) {
  
  data <- models[[model_name]]
  
  baseline_data <- subset(data, gender == "default" & nation == "default")
  baseline_counts <- table(factor(baseline_data$industry, levels = categories))
  
  baseline_probs <- (baseline_counts + 1) / sum(baseline_counts + 1)
  
  for (group_name in names(groups)) {
    
    filters <- groups[[group_name]]
    persona_data <- subset(data, gender == filters$gender & nation == filters$nation)
    
    observed <- table(factor(persona_data$industry, levels = categories))
    
    if (sum(observed) == 0) {
      cat("\n[Warning] No data found for:", model_name, "-", group_name, "\n")
      next
    }
    
    observed_probs <- observed / sum(observed)
    
    if (group_name == "default") {
      
      chi_res <- chisq.test(x = observed, p = rep(1/length(categories), length(categories)))
      
      cat("\n======================================================\n")
      cat("STEP 1: SYSTEMIC BIAS (Technical Skew) | Model:", model_name, "\n")
      print(chi_res)
      
      # Cramér's V
      V <- sqrt(as.numeric(chi_res$statistic) / 
                (sum(observed) * (length(categories) - 1)))
      
      cat("Cramér's V (Effect Size of Tech Skew):", V, "\n")
      
    } else {
      
      expected <- sum(observed) * baseline_probs
      
      if (any(expected < 5)) {
        cat("\n[Warning] Low expected counts (<5) for:", model_name, "-", group_name, "\n")
      }
      
      chi_res <- suppressWarnings(
        chisq.test(x = observed, p = baseline_probs)
      )
      
      cat("\n--- STEP 2: TRIGGERED BIAS (Sensitivity) --- \n")
      cat("Model:", model_name, "| Persona:", group_name, "\n")
      print(chi_res)
      
      V_sens <- sqrt(as.numeric(chi_res$statistic) / 
                     (sum(observed) * (length(categories) - 1)))
      
      cat("Cramér's V (Persona Sensitivity):", V_sens, "\n")
      
      TVD <- 0.5 * sum(abs(observed_probs - baseline_probs))
      
      cat("Total Variation Distance (Robust Sensitivity):", TVD, "\n")
      
      JSD <- jsd(observed_probs, baseline_probs)

      cat("Jensen-Shannon Divergence:", JSD, "\n")
    }
  }
}
```

# Histrogramms Default
```{r industries-histogramms-default, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
industries_gpt_default <- subset(gpt_raw_industries, gender == "default" & nation == "default")
industries_deepseek_default <- subset(deepseek_raw_industries, gender == "default" & nation == "default")
industries_grok_default <- subset(grok_raw_industries, gender == "default" & nation == "default")
# Bar plots
ggplot(industries_gpt_default, aes(x = industry)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Industry (ChatGPT, default nation & gender)",
       x = "Industry",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(industries_deepseek_default, aes(x = industry)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Industry (DeepSeek, default nation & gender)",
       x = "Industry",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(industries_grok_default, aes(x = industry)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Industry (Grok, default nation & gender)",
       x = "Industry",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```
# Histrogramms Male
```{r industry-histogramms-male, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
industries_gpt_male <- subset(gpt_raw_industries, gender == "male" & nation == "default")
industries_deepseek_male <- subset(deepseek_raw_industries, gender == "male" & nation == "default")
industries_grok_male <- subset(grok_raw_industries, gender == "male" & nation == "default")
# Bar plots
ggplot(industries_gpt_male, aes(x = industry)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Industry (ChatGPT, Male)",
       x = "Industry",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(industries_deepseek_male, aes(x = industry)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Industry (DeepSeek, Male)",
       x = "Industry",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(industries_grok_male, aes(x = industry)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Industry (Grok, Male)",
       x = "Industry",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

# Histrogramms Female
```{r industry-histogramms-female, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
industries_gpt_female <- subset(gpt_raw_industries, gender == "female" & nation == "default")
industries_deepseek_female <- subset(deepseek_raw_industries, gender == "female" & nation == "default")
industries_grok_female <- subset(grok_raw_industries, gender == "female" & nation == "default")
# Bar plots
ggplot(industries_gpt_female, aes(x = industry)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Industry (ChatGPT, Female)",
       x = "Industry",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(industries_deepseek_female, aes(x = industry)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Industry (DeepSeek, Female)",
       x = "Industry",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(industries_grok_female, aes(x = industry)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Industry (Grok, Female)",
       x = "Industry",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

# Histrogramms Non Binary
```{r industry-histogramms-non-binary, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
industries_gpt_non_binary <- subset(gpt_raw_industries, gender == "non_binary" & nation == "default")
industries_deepseek_non_binary <- subset(deepseek_raw_industries, gender == "non_binary" & nation == "default")
industries_grok_non_binary <- subset(grok_raw_industries, gender == "non_binary" & nation == "default")
# Bar plots
ggplot(industries_gpt_non_binary, aes(x = industry)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Industry (ChatGPT, Non Binary)",
       x = "Industry",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(industries_deepseek_non_binary, aes(x = industry)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Industry (DeepSeek, Non Binary)",
       x = "Industry",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(industries_grok_non_binary, aes(x = industry)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Industry (Grok, Non Binary)",
       x = "Industry",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```
# Histrogramms Paper
```{r histogramms-paper, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
industries_gpt_somalian <- subset(gpt_raw_industries, gender == "default" & nation == "somalian")
industries_gpt_default <- subset(gpt_raw_industries, gender == "default" & nation == "default")

ggplot(industries_gpt_somalian, aes(x = industry)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Industry",
       y = "Number of Recommendations") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggsave("industry_requests_somalian_gpt.pdf", width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)

ggplot(industries_gpt_default, aes(x = industry)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Industry",
       y = "Number of Recommendations") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggsave("industry_requests_baseline_gpt.pdf", width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)


industries_grok_default <- subset(grok_raw_industries, gender == "default" & nation == "default")
industries_grok_non_binary <- subset(grok_raw_industries, gender == "non_binary" & nation == "default")


ggplot(industries_grok_default, aes(x = industry)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Industry",
       y = "Number of Recommendations") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggsave("industry_requests_baseline_grok.pdf", width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)

ggplot(industries_grok_non_binary, aes(x = industry)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Industry",
       y = "Number of Recommendations") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggsave("industry_requests_non_binary_grok.pdf", width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)



```
# Master Table JSD
```{r master-table, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(kableExtra)
library(dplyr)

jsd_data <- data.frame(
  Persona = c("Non-Binary", "Female", "Male", "Austrian", "Somalian", "Japanese", "Canadian", "Australian", "Brazilian"),
  GPT_Fac = c(0.205082, 0.2050823, 0.02660457, 0.05597756, 0.1868724, 0.1361915, 0.05859395, 0.04877, 0.08421826),
  DS_Fac  = c(0.8517378, 0.4722395, 0.06230477, 0.3899182, 0.3203015, 0.2155579, 0.04165276, 0.2243805, 0.2355162),
  Grok_Fac = c(0.9188719, 0.05783851, 0.0170552, 0.4095322, 0.6318118, 0.03622124, 0.08594329, 0.2763608, 0.2928464),
  GPT_Sch = c(0.5105698, 0.1226743, 0.09242414, 0.0139918, 0.09812481, 0.07834614, 0.07318209, 0.08268091, 0.04711791),
  DS_Sch  = c(0.9053498, 0.2378791, 0.04279977, 0.03281403, 0.1576401, 0.2306472, 0.06420358, 0.07637319, 0.1274788),
  Grok_Sch = c(0.9732264, 0.5402136, 0.1619204, 0.01217599, 0.7788638, 0.3088034, 0.1532305, 0.608958, 0.5517516),
  GPT_Ind = c(0.7545909, 0.4641668, 0.05602107, 0.2732205, 0.9541914, 0.151212, 0.03017499, 0.1872155, 0.2904678),
  DS_Ind  = c(0.8801024, 0.3460793, 0.0326055, 0.2196955, 0.7243192, 0.01567242, 0.0401982, 0.02685619, 0.03969323),
  Grok_Ind = c(0.1782265, 0.1612095, 0.02208562, 0.3631889, 0.727126, 0.09565002, 0.04939264, 0.06125605, 0.2205551)
)


jsd_data_rounded <- jsd_data %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 3)))

table_out <- jsd_data_rounded %>%
  kbl(format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE, escape = FALSE, longtable = TRUE,
      caption = "Comparison of Jensen-Shannon Divergence (JSD) Scores Across Models and Lists",
      col.names = c("Persona", "GPT", "DS", "Grok", "GPT", "DS", "Grok", "GPT", "DS", "Grok")) %>%
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1, "University Faculties" = 3, "Secondary Schools" = 3, "AMS Industries" = 3)) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("striped", "scale_down", "hold_position")) %>%
  column_spec(1, bold = TRUE)


for (i in 2:10) {
  table_out <- table_out %>%
    column_spec(i, color = ifelse(jsd_data[, i] > 0.20, "red", "black"))
}

cat(table_out)
```

#Master Table Cramer
```{r master-table-cramer, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(kableExtra)
library(dplyr)

cv_data <- data.frame(
  Context = c("University Faculties", "Secondary Schools", "AMS Industries"),
  GPT = c(0.5682504, 0.2891936, 0.6320759),
  DeepSeek = c(0.6302985, 0.7133704, 0.976457),
  Grok = c(0.9722816, 0.9405323, 0.8464987)
)

cv_data_rounded <- cv_data %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 3)))

table_cv_out <- cv_data_rounded %>%
  kbl(format = "latex", 
      booktabs = TRUE, 
      escape = FALSE,
      align = "l|ccc", # The '|' creates the vertical line after the first column
      caption = "Comparison of Systemic Bias (Cramér's V) Baseline Skew",
      col.names = c("Recommendation Context", "GPT-4o mini", "DeepSeek V3", "Grok 3 mini")) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("striped", "hold_position")) %>%
  column_spec(1, bold = TRUE) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE)

cat(table_cv_out)
```
</div></pre>
